claims.text: The review calibrator catches 6 unsupported criticisms out of 20 synthetic reviews.
The calibrator preserves all grounded criticisms in the same fixture.
The calibrator does not evaluate reviewer tone or writing style.

review_layers.text: The paper ignores reviewer tone, which is the key signal for review quality.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

review_layers.text: The paper reports unsupported criticism catches but does not run on real conference reviews.
evidence: Paper does not report evaluation on real conference reviews.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: A small public or synthetic-converted conference-review fixture is available.
review_layers.next_action: Evaluate on a small real-review fixture.

review_layers.text: The preservation of grounded criticisms is supported only on synthetic reviews.
evidence: Paper evidence is fixture-limited but not contradicted.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: More cases may expose rare failures.
review_layers.next_action: Defer broadening until the primary missing experiment is resolved.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Evaluate on a small real-review fixture
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Evaluate on a small real-review fixture.
